subject: docs(claude): point to glow-props patterns, add Communication section
body:
Replaced inline Suggested Implementations section with a pointer to
the glow-props repo (single source of truth for all devmade-ai
implementation patterns). Added top-level Communication section per
glow-props standard, updated header line, and pruned AI Notes bullets
now covered by Communication. Rewrote HTTPS_PROXY AI Note to reference
the glow-props pattern and added a prohibition against local pattern
copies.

Tags: documentation, cleanup, standards
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: doc-hygiene
Semver: patch
